system.Text:
__When you spend time recovering within a community__, roll +heart. If you share a bond with someone in the community, add +1.

On a __hit__, this is a safe refuge. You and your allies may each choose one. On a __strong hit__,  choose two. An individual option can be taken mroe than once.

  * @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} with an automatic strong hit.
  * Make Plans: Take +2 momentum.
  * Take a Quest: Envision what this community. needs. If you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to provide aid, add +1.

On a __miss__, choose one.

  * The community needs your help, or makes a costly demand in exchange for safe harbor. Envision what they ask of you. If you do it, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to see it done, resolve this move as a strong hit.
  * You find no relief, and the situation grows worse. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you spend time recovering within a community...

Strong Hit.Text:
On a __strong hit__, this is a safe refuge. You and your allies may each choose two. An individual option can be taken mroe than once.

  * @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} with an automatic strong hit.
  * Make Plans: Take +2 momentum.
  * Take a Quest: Envision what this community. needs. If you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to provide aid, add +1.

Weak Hit.Text:
On a __hit__, this is a safe refuge. You and your allies may each choose one. An individual option can be taken mroe than once.

  * @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} with an automatic strong hit.
  * Make Plans: Take +2 momentum.
  * Take a Quest: Envision what this community. needs. If you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to provide aid, add +1.

Miss.Text:
On a __miss__, choose one.

  * The community needs your help, or makes a costly demand in exchange for safe harbor. Envision what they ask of you. If you do it, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to see it done, resolve this move as a strong hit.
  * You find no relief, and the situation grows worse. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
